target: HAGFISH-SKEIN (compact low-rank refusal seed expanded on-demand by learned adversary-dependent operator to high-rank defensive manifold)

results.title: Hagfish slime threads (eLife)
results.notes: Source-domain biology paper, not LLM defense; no functional match.

results.title: ProAct (2025/10)
results.notes: Proactive classifier-triggered defense; lacks compact-seed expansion mechanism.

results.title: KV-Budget Depletion Defense (2026/4)
results.notes: Refusal tokens fill KV cache; capacity-occupation theme but no rank seed expansion.

results.title: Attention Budget Throttling (2026/3)
results.notes: Throttles attention budget; unrelated to low-rank seed expansion mechanism.

results.title: One-Shot Steering (2025/2)
results.notes: Pre-computed steering vector; fixed-shape output, not adversary-dependent rank expansion.

results.title: Compact-Seed Defensive Expansion via Tunable Rank Operator (2026/4)
results.notes: Direct match: low-rank refusal seed + adversary-feature-gain operator + high-rank defensive manifold on detection.

results.title: Defense Adapters with Adaptive Rank Expansion (2025/10)
results.notes: Defense adapter rank dynamically expanded by threat severity; matches adversary-dependent expansion idea.

results.title: Inference-Time Defensive Tensor Expansion (2026/3)
results.notes: Low-rank seed projected at inference time into defensive tensor; matches compact-seed on-demand expansion.

summary.novelty_assessment: Three hits (ranks 6, 7, 8) cover the core HAGFISH-SKEIN mechanism: compact low-rank seed expanded on-demand into high-rank defensive structure with adversary/threat-dependent gain. The candidate's central claim of compact-seed-stored-defense expanding by tunable adversary-dependent factor at inference is anticipated by prior art.
